titleZh: 实施细则：新《公司法》资本充足要求
titleEn: Capitalisation Requirements under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 说明新《公司法》资本缴付与验资要求配套规制的实施时间、金额确认和诉讼风险，为投资、增资和公司设立业务提供落地提示。
abstractEn: Explains the implementation of capitalisation requirements under the new Company Law, with practical notes on timing, contribution mechanics, and litigation risk.
